Gandikota

# Gandikota

### A historical epic fiction set in the times of the Vijayanagara Empire

[](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

![Ratnakar Sadasyula's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!R73I!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81a2c542-8b3f-4ade-98d2-a40950cffbe3_2640x1980.jpeg)

[Ratnakar Sadasyula](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

Dec 29, 2022

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Share

Gandikota, is an epic novel set in the times of the Vijayanagara Empire. The novel **revolves around** Pemmasani Ramalinga Nayaka the commander of the Vijayanagara Empire who leads it to victory in the Battle of Raichur. However his success, leads to jealousy among a group of rivals, who implicate him in a false plot to overthrow the Emperor, Krishnadeva Raya. On the run, having to prove his innocence, Pemmasani, however has to face an even more deadly conspiracy, one that threatens the very existence of Vijayanagara.

To all my subscribers here, request to please subscribe to the following publication for more chapters and updates going ahead.

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!A-Hk!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb129670f-3c61-4523-b896-86d5fe3198a2_512x512.png)Gandikota ](https://ratnakarwriter.substack.com?utm_source=substack&utm_campaign=publication_embed&utm_medium=web)

Pemmasani Ramalinga Nayaka the commander of the Vijayanagara Empire, leads it to victory in the Battle of Raichur. However his success, leads to jealousy among a group of rivals, who implicate him in a false plot to overthrow the Emperor, Krishnadeva Raya

By Ratnakar Sadasyula
